task_completion.description: Verify that the agent successfully logged into the NOSH ChartingSystem as Dr. James Carter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or main interface is visible, and there is an indication that the user logged in is Dr. James Carter or 'demo_provider' (e.g., a welcome message or user profile menu).

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the settings, preferences, or provider profile page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings, preferences, or provider profile configuration page is open within the NOSH ChartingSystem interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent located the 'Schedule Increment' setting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form field, dropdown, or setting explicitly labeled 'Schedule Increment' (or similar wording related to appointment slot duration) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent changed the schedule increment value to 15 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Schedule Increment' input field or dropdown displays '15' or '15 minutes', indicating it has been changed from the initial 20 minutes.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent saved the updated settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification, toast message (e.g., 'Settings saved', 'Profile updated'), or a visual confirmation that the form was submitted with the new 15-minute value is visible.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the web browser GUI to interact with the NOSH ChartingSystem.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is open displaying the NOSH ChartingSystem interface. No terminal windows showing curl requests or automated scripts are used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal, MySQL command line, or database management tool (like phpMyAdmin) is visible executing UPDATE commands on the 'providers' table.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the genuine NOSH application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual NOSH ChartingSystem web interface, not a text editor, local HTML file, or manipulated mock page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The provider ID for Dr. James Carter is 2. The initial schedule increment is 20 minutes, and the expected value after the task is 15 minutes. The setting corresponds to the 'schedule_increment' column in the 'providers' table. The agent must use the NOSH web interface to make this change.
